text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I fell short. I'll never live this
down...
choice_data_list: Once we get back, it's training time!

choice_data_list: Once we get back, it's training time!
Once we get back, it's training time!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I can't just keep telling myself, "There's always next time." I want to be number one in every race!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I won't forget the bitterness of this defeat!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, obviously! That was my plan all along. I'm
gonna take this frustration and pour it into my
running!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: C'mon, let's go already! We can sprint back!
